title: cephalomanes javanicum
intro: Cephalomanes javanicum, also known as Java polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cephalomanes javanicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. It is often prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it can also be consumed as a raw supplement or added to herbal remedies.
